title: user.verified
description: Published by User Service when a user completes identity verification. Consumed by Discovery Service to add the user to the geospatial scan pool.
_comment_event_driven: Past-tense naming signals a fact, not a command. Discovery Service reacts autonomously — User Service has no knowledge of Discovery Service's existence.
_comment_event_id: event_id is the idempotency key. Every consumer stores it in a processed_events table to safely skip duplicate deliveries under Kafka's at-least-once guarantee.

event_id.description: UUID v4 — deduplication key for consumer idempotency. Written to outbox table by producer in the same DB transaction as the verification record.

gender.description: Used by Discovery Service to apply the women-only mode filter server-side. Never exposed in API responses to other users.

verified_at.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp of verification completion.
